name: Ginger Chicken Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Chicken breasts (skinned and boned, cut into 1-1/2 inch pieces)
1/3 cup White wine OR chicken broth
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow baking dish, combine teriyaki sauce and water; add chicken pieces, coating well. Cover and refrigerate for two hours.
2. Drain marinade from chicken pieces.
3. Heat oil in a large skillet or wok. Stir-fry chicken and onion until chicken is slightly browned.
4. Stir in vegetables, ginger, and wine. Cover and simmer 4 to 5 minutes, or until vegetables are tender crisp.
5. In a small bowl, combine cornstarch and water until smooth. Gradually add to skillet, stirring constantly until thickened.
6. Serve over hot rice.
Or use 1 package (16 ounces) frozen vegetable mixture of your choice.
Each serving provides:
- 279 calories
- 18.7 g. protein
- 7.3 g. fat
- 34.1 g. carbohydrate
- 515 mg. sodium
- 37 mg. cholesterol
NOTE: Optional ingredients are omitted from the nutritional calculations. When ingredient options appear in a recipe, the first ingredient choice is used for calculation.
